title: Missing tests for AMD GPU ATOM firmware parsing
description: The AMD GPU plugin lacks unit tests for the FuAmdGpuAtomFirmware class, which handles complex binary firmware parsing.
rationale: The fu-amd-gpu-atom-firmware.c file contains logic to parse VBIOS structures. This logic is self-contained and suitable for unit testing, but requires creating a fu-self-test.c and potentially a test fixture.

title: Untested checksum guessing logic
description: The fwupd_checksum_guess_kind function, which determines checksum type by length, is not explicitly tested.
rationale: The function has clear input/output behavior (string length -> enum) and is trivial to test in fwupd-self-test.c.

title: Untested user agent generation
description: The fwupd_client_get_user_agent function and its underlying generation logic are not verified for correct formatting.
rationale: While the client is tested, the specific format of the user agent string (containing OS, version, etc.) is not asserted. Can be tested in fwupd-self-test.c.

title: Flaky random sleep in thread tests
description: The test uses g_usleep with a random duration, which introduces non-determinism and potential flakiness.
rationale: Random sleeps are unreliable for synchronization. Synchronization primitives should be used to ensure deterministic test execution.

title: Missing error handling test for GUID hashing
description: fwupd_guid_hash_data checks for NULL input using g_return_val_if_fail, but this error path is not covered by tests.
rationale: Easy to add g_assert_null(fwupd_guid_hash_data(NULL, ...)) in fwupd-self-test.c to ensure the safety check works as expected.

title: Missing tests for Android Boot device
description: The Android Boot plugin lacks unit tests for the FuAndroidBootDevice class.
rationale: The device logic should be tested to ensure it correctly interacts with the Android boot protocol, possibly using mocks for udev and file I/O.
